description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that builds on multiple operating systems (windows-latest, ubuntu-latest), architectures (x86, x64), and Qt versions (5.6, 5.9, 5.13.2). For each combination, check out the code, install Qt, additional dependencies like SQLite and CMake, create a build environment, configure CMake, and build the project.
